abilities.description: Your giant spider is a creature of subterfuge methods. When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by commanding them to set a trap or ensnare, add +1. On a strong hit, mark progress.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by sending your discreet, giant spider to scout ahead within a site, roll +their health and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} by sending your soul-piercing, giant spider to study someone, roll +the giant spider's health. On a hit, it returns to reveal the target's deepest fears through a reflection in the glassy eyes; take +1 momentum. If you use this to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information}, reroll any dice.
